MASTER CALENDAR JURY

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories; And For Sanctions; Pos
Off Calendar Apr-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Jennifer J. Shih, Esq., appearing for Defendant and Moving party Chen's Plumbing, Inc. DEFENDANT CHEN'S PLUMBING INC.'S Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories; And For Sanctions. The parties stipulated to have the matter decided by a Judge Pro Tem.
There being no objection tentative ruling is adopted. Unopposed Motion is Granted. Sanctions are awarded as prayed. Order signed in open court. Judge: James Watson, Judge Pro Tem. Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos. Proceedings not reported. (302)

MINI MINUTES: Jennifer J. Shih, Esq., appearing for Defendant and Moving party Chen's Plumbing, Inc. DEFENDANT CHEN'S PLUMBING INC.'S Motion to Compel Responses to request for Production Of Documents; And For Sanctions.
There being no objection tentative ruling is adopted. Unopposed Motion is Granted. Sanctions are awarded as prayed. Order signed in open court. Judge: James Watson, Judge Pro Tem. Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos. Proceedings not reported. (302)

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHEN'S PLUMBING INC'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES; AND FOR SANCTIONS.
Appearances: Jennifer J. Shih of Kidd Carr LLP (510.268.8600) for defendant and moving party; no other appearances.
There being no appearance on behalf of plaintiff, plaintiff is deemed to have stipulated to having the matter decided by a Judge Pro Tem. Discussed and the court continued the matter to April 13, 2012. Defendant is to submit courtesy copies of its papers to department 302. (302/JPT) Judge Pro Tem: James Watson; Not reported
